chapter_title.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الشَّيْخِ الْكَبِيرِ وَ الْمَرِيضِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 64 – The Salāt of an elderly man and the sick

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/334)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف على المشهور - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (5/334)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْمَبْطُونِ فَقَالَ يَبْنِي عَلَى صَلَاتِهِ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl Bin Ziyad, from Ibn Abu Nasr, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Muhammad Bin Muslim who said,
‘I asked Abu Ja’farasws about the one with incontinence.[1605] So heasws said: ‘He would continue upon his Salāt’ (wherever he is that state).
en.sarwar: 7. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad ibn abu Nasr from ibn Bukayr from Muhammad ibn Muslim who has said the following: “I once asked abu Ja‘far, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of one who suffers from an internal illness because of which is not able to control anal discharge. He (the Imam) said, ‘He continues his Salah (prayer) wherever in Salah (prayer) he is.’”
